inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar mehsoos kar raha hoon, sir dard ho raha hai, thoda kamjori bhi mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Though possible, typhoid typically presents with more specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mere bukhar mein roz roz izafa ho raha hai, ab mere pet mein bhi dard ho raha hai aur kabz bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise increase in fever and abdominal pain are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause abdominal pain and constipation

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever less likely given the specific gastrointestinal symptoms

inputs.text: Aaj mere bukhar kaafi tez hai, kabz ke baad ab dast ho rahi hai, aur mere andar bahut kamjori mehsoos ho rahi hai
inputs.image_desc: red rash on arms and chest

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: High fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea but the pattern and severity differ from typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause fever but typically does not cause gastrointestinal symptoms seen in typhoid

inputs.text: Main bahut thakaya mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar abhi tak baaki hai, aur doctor ne kaha hai ki mere intestine ko khatra hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription and blood test report shown

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Continued high fever and risk of intestinal perforation confirm typhoid diagnosis

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to specific symptoms and complications not typical of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out as symptoms and complications do not align with malaria
